---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the Frontend Service
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem/Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe your preferred solution. Include mockups or wireframes if available.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots here.

## Impact

- **Pages affected**: [e.g., Dashboard, ChatAgents, Settings]
- **Accessibility considerations**: [e.g., keyboard navigation, screen reader]
- **Mobile support needed**: [Yes/No]
